title: T1 Primitives
description: Canonical agentic primitives — the Layer-2 chatmode catalog. Every chat turn ships these 16 meta-tools.

sections.title: Discovery
sections.description: Discovery primitives — find tools/agents at runtime

items.name: Task
items.description: Azure IAM audit

items.name: agent_send
items.description: The agent_session_id of the running sub-agent (from agent_list or the original Task tool_use_id).

items.name: agent_list
items.description: Enumerate the live (running) sub-agent sessions tied to this chat.

items.name: agent_stop
items.description: The agent_session_id of the running sub-agent to terminate (from agent_list).

sections.title: IO
sections.description: Read/write the outside world — web, large results, synth tools

items.name: read_large_result
items.description: Retrieve a paged slice of a previously-stored large tool result by its artifactHandle.

items.name: web_search
items.description: Plain-language search query. Examples:

items.name: web_fetch
items.description: Absolute URL to fetch. Must be http:// or https://. Server enforces SSRF denylist (no IMDS, no metadata endpoints, no RFC1918, no *.svc.cluster.local).

sections.title: Memory
sections.description: Save and recall exemplars across sessions

items.name: pattern_save

items.name: pattern_recall
items.description: The natural language query (usually the user prompt or your reformulation of it).

items.name: compose_visual
items.description: Pick the template. Each has a strict data shape.

items.name: compose_app
items.description: Freestyle path — full HTML document including <!doctype html> +

items.name: render_artifact
items.description: The artifact kind.
